expectations.text: Classifies the bug as INTERNAL (data/logic bug within src/) with explicit reasoning
expectations.evidence: Explicit 'Classification: INTERNAL — entirely within src/lib/call-reviews/grading-prompt.ts and its interaction with the display layer'

expectations.text: Does NOT fire a Perplexity or external research search for this internally-scoped bug
expectations.evidence: No research tools called. Jumped directly to Step 3 root cause analysis after classification.

expectations.text: Reads at least one relevant call review component or API route to trace the data flow
expectations.evidence: Reads grading-prompt.ts, grade-review.ts, CallReviewsTab.tsx, types.ts — full pipeline trace

expectations.text: Checks git log or recent changes on relevant files to find what changed

expectations.text: States a root cause hypothesis before proposing a fix
expectations.evidence: Clear root cause: 'normalize() stores sentinel string "Unknown" in DB; truthy check in display layer means phone fallback never fires'
